---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What workflow is currently difficult or impossible?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. How should it work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is the proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or other context that helps explain the request.
